steps.title: Identify the target meaning
steps.content: The passage says they “share basic ______” and then specifies this involves physical traits (spines, snouts, body size) both groups independently developed. The blank needs a word for shared characteristics or commonalities.

steps.title: Match the word to the meaning
steps.content: ”Similarities with” expresses the shared traits both groups have. The other choices don't fit: they suggest other types of relationships (model-and-example, emotion, or evidence) rather than parallel characteristics. That matches choice D — D is correct.
